name: mcp-skill-doctor
description: Local-first CLI to diagnose why your MCP server or skill will not start.

scripts.check:broken: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js check --config examples/broken-server.json
scripts.check:valid: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js check --config examples/valid-server.json
scripts.probe:fake: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js probe --command node -- args examples/fake-server.js
scripts.probe:crash: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js probe --command node -- args examples/crash-server.js
